Class AuxiliaryContractBuilders.GoalsConfigurator

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AuxiliaryContractBuilders.GoalsConfigurator
Enclosing class:
AuxiliaryContractBuilders
public static final class AuxiliaryContractBuilders.GoalsConfigurator extends Object
This class contains methods to add the premisses for the block contract rule to the goal.

  • Constructor Details

    • GoalsConfigurator

      public GoalsConfigurator(AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp application, TermLabelState termLabelState, AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiation instantiation, List<Label> labels, AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables, PosInOccurrence occurrence, Services services, AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule rule)
      Parameters:
      application - the rule application.
      termLabelState - the term label state.
      instantiation - the instantiation
      labels - all labels belonging to the block.
      variables - the contract's variables.
      occurrence - the position at which the rule is applied.
      services - services.
      rule - the rule being applied.

  • Method Details

    • setUpValidityGoal

      public JTerm setUpValidityGoal(Goal goal, JTerm[] updates, JTerm[] assumptions, JTerm[] postconditions, ProgramVariable exceptionParameter, AuxiliaryContract.Terms terms)
      Parameters:
      goal - If this is not null, the returned term is added to this goal.
      updates - the updates.
      assumptions - the preconditions.
      postconditions - the postconditions.
      exceptionParameter - the exception variable.
      terms - the termified variables.
      Returns:
      the term for the validity goal.

    • setUpLoopValidityGoal

      public JTerm setUpLoopValidityGoal(Goal goal, LoopContract contract, JTerm context, JTerm remember, JTerm rememberNext, Map<LocationVariable, Function> anonOutHeaps, Map<LocationVariable, JTerm> modifiableClauses, Map<LocationVariable, JTerm> freeModifiableClauses, JTerm[] assumptions, JTerm decreasesCheck, JTerm[] postconditions, JTerm[] postconditionsNext, LocationVariable exceptionParameter, AuxiliaryContract.Terms terms, AuxiliaryContract.Variables nextVars)
      Parameters:
      goal - If this is not null, the returned term is added to this goal.
      contract - the contract being applied.
      context - the context update.
      remember - the remembrance update for the current loop iteration.
      rememberNext - the remembrance update for the next loop iteration.
      anonOutHeaps - the heaps used in the anonOut update.
      modifiableClauses - the modified clauses.
      assumptions - the assumptions.
      decreasesCheck - the decreases check.
      postconditions - the current loop iteration's postconditions.
      postconditionsNext - the next loop iteration's postconditions.
      exceptionParameter - the exception variable.
      terms - the termified variables.
      nextVars - the variables for the next loop iteration.
      Returns:
      the term for the validity goal in a loop contract rule app.

    • setUpPreconditionGoal

      public void setUpPreconditionGoal(Goal goal, JTerm update, JTerm[] preconditions)
      Sets up the precondition goal.
      Parameters:
      goal - the precondition goal.
      update - the update.
      preconditions - the preconditions.

    • setUpUsageGoal

      public void setUpUsageGoal(Goal goal, JTerm[] updates, JTerm[] assumptions)
      Sets up the usage goal.
      Parameters:
      goal - the usage goal.
      updates - the updates.
      assumptions - the preconditions.
